system.text:
You are a file manager. Use the exact workspace tools requested by the user. Do not substitute other workspace tools when exact tools are named. Be concise after the tools complete.

Fake sandbox for executing commands.

In-memory filesystem. All file paths are relative to /mem.

content.text:
Perform these exact workspace tool calls in order:
1. Call workspace_append_file with path="/project/source.txt" and content="-beta".
2. Call workspace_copy_file with src="/project/source.txt", dest="/project/copied.txt", overwrite=true.
3. Call workspace_move_file with src="/project/copied.txt", dest="/project/moved.txt", overwrite=true.
4. Call workspace_delete_file with path="/project/source.txt".
5. Call workspace_rmdir with path="/project/remove-me", recursive=true, force=false.
Then answer only: done.

tools.name: workspace_read_file
tools.description: Read the contents of a file from the workspace. For large files prefer targeted inspection (grep/sed via workspace_execute_command) or str-replace edits over re-reading the whole file.

path.description: Path to the file to read

tools.name: workspace_str_replace_file
tools.description: Replace one exact, unique text match in a workspace file without rewriting the whole file.

path.description: Path to the file to edit

old_str.description: Exact text to replace. Must match exactly and be unique.

new_str.description: Replacement text to write in place of old_str.

tools.name: workspace_batch_str_replace_file
tools.description: Apply multiple exact text replacements to a workspace file atomically. If any replacement fails, no changes are written.

path.description: Path to the file to edit

old_str.description: Exact text to replace. Must match exactly and be unique.

new_str.description: Replacement text to write in place of old_str.

replacements.description: Ordered exact string replacements applied atomically.

tools.name: workspace_write_file
tools.description: Write content to a file in the workspace

path.description: Path to the file to write

content.description: Content to write to the file

recursive.description: Create parent directories if they do not exist

tools.name: workspace_list_files
tools.description: List files and directories in the workspace

path.description: Directory path to list

recursive.description: List files recursively

tools.name: workspace_file_stat
tools.description: Get metadata about a file or directory

path.description: Path to the file or directory

tools.name: workspace_mkdir
tools.description: Create a directory in the workspace

path.description: Path of the directory to create

recursive.description: Create parent directories if needed

tools.name: workspace_delete_file
tools.description: Delete a file or directory from the workspace

path.description: Path to the file or directory to delete

recursive.description: Delete directories and their contents recursively

force.description: Ignore errors if the file does not exist

tools.name: workspace_append_file
tools.description: Append content to a file in the workspace

path.description: Path to the file to append to

content.description: Content to append to the file

tools.name: workspace_copy_file
tools.description: Copy a file or directory in the workspace

src.description: Source path of the file or directory to copy

overwrite.description: Overwrite the destination if it already exists

tools.name: workspace_move_file
tools.description: Move or rename a file or directory in the workspace

src.description: Source path of the file or directory to move

overwrite.description: Overwrite the destination if it already exists

tools.name: workspace_rmdir
tools.description: Remove a directory from the workspace

path.description: Path of the directory to remove

recursive.description: Remove the directory and its contents recursively

force.description: Ignore errors if the directory does not exist

tools.name: workspace_execute_command
tools.description: Execute a shell command in the sandbox

tools.name: workspace_list_processes
tools.description: List all background processes spawned in the sandbox

tools.name: workspace_kill_process
tools.description: Kill a background process in the sandbox by PID

pid.description: PID of the process to kill
